task_summary: SP27b repaired live speech semantics after a prior one-shot only relabeled old fixture-like text. Live desk speech now branches on live_mew_reads and includes desk status plus pet context; non-live output remains honest as local terminal or fixture-sourced speech.

tests_run.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format human --form cat --fixture-terminal --watch-count 1 --interval 0 --output /tmp/mew-wisp-sp27-fixture-speech.txt
tests_run.result: fixture speech says local terminal and does not claim live desk

tests_run.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=.uv-cache uv run python experiments/mew-ghost/ghost.py --format human --form cat --watch-count 1 --interval 0 --output /tmp/mew-wisp-sp27-live-speech.txt
tests_run.result: default live speech says live desk with live status/pet context

notes: Task #46 produced a verifier-green but semantically weak live-desk prefix. Codex rejected it as reviewer without product-code edits and launched task #47 as a one-shot semantic repair. mew inspected the prior diff, identified the relabeling issue, and produced the accepted source/test repair. Issue #29 remains implementation-lane evidence for the earlier broad verifier rollback and split-slice need.
